name: ewelink_smart_home
description: Control Zigbee/WiFi smart home devices via eWeLink. Speak naturally in any language ('включи свет везде', 'turn off light in living room', 'toggle Mark's room') or use structured commands: list | on <name> | off <name> | toggle <name> | status <name>. Multi-channel: on <name> ch=1,3.
help_example: включи свет везде / turn off light in living room / list
